summary: Strong test suite with comprehensive coverage of all major requirements (secret classification, reporting, multiple formats, error handling, exit codes). Well-organized Pester tests plus thorough act integration harness. Good fixture isolation and independence. Minor gaps: boundary conditions at window edges not explicitly tested, some parameter validation edge cases missing (negative WarningDays, etc.), act harness only tests 3 representative cases. Would reliably catch regressions in core functionality.
